prompt: A thermal imaging scan of a human hand demonstrating different heat zones, displaying in a color spectrum from purple to red.
prompt_refined: Photorealistic thermal imaging scan of a human hand, clearly showing varying heat zones. The thermal signature should be depicted using a color spectrum that transitions smoothly from deep purple to bright red.
objects: varying heat zones on the hand
color spectrum transitioning from deep purple to bright red
deep purple (as part of the color spectrum)
bright red (as part of the color spectrum)
